news.title:
Maruti Suzuki shares fell up to 6% due to concerns over new CAFE 2027 norms impacting its strategy.
Reduced hybrid benefits and EV adoption pressure highlight Maruti's lag behind peers like Tata Motors and M&M.
news.summary:
Maruti Suzuki shares fell up to 6% due to concerns over new CAFE 2027 norms impacting its strategy.
Reduced hybrid benefits and EV adoption pressure highlight Maruti's lag behind peers like Tata Motors and M&M.

news.title: Maruti Suzuki India to announce its Q4 results on April 28.
news.summary: Maruti Suzuki India to announce its Q4 results on April 28.

news.title:
Maruti Suzuki saw an NSE block trade of Rs. 26.7 Cr for ~19,464 shares.
The trade was executed at approximately Rs. 13,700 per share.
news.summary:
Maruti Suzuki saw an NSE block trade of Rs. 26.7 Cr for ~19,464 shares.
The trade was executed at approximately Rs. 13,700 per share.

news.title:
Haryana raises minimum wages by 35% after protests over cost hikes.
Workers boycotted work citing soaring costs due to U.S.-Iran conflict.
news.summary:
Haryana raises minimum wages by 35% after protests over cost hikes.
Workers boycotted work citing soaring costs due to U.S.-Iran conflict.

news.title:
Centre's revised CAFÉ-III norms scrap weight-based concessions, affecting small carmakers like Maruti Suzuki and Renault.
New norms enforce uniform emission compliance, impacting lightweight vehicle makers, with no relief for small cars.
news.summary:
Centre's revised CAFÉ-III norms scrap weight-based concessions, affecting small carmakers like Maruti Suzuki and Renault.
New norms enforce uniform emission compliance, impacting lightweight vehicle makers, with no relief for small cars.

news.title:
JM Financial's Q4 playbook highlights sectors like IT, autos, telecom, and metals as key growth drivers. Preferred stocks include Infosys, Maruti Suzuki, ICICI Bank, Tata Steel, and Bharti Airtel.
Cautious on consumer, pharma, and utilities; stocks like HDFC Bank, Bajaj Finance, and LTIMindtree are marked 'avoid'. Report emphasizes sector-focused stock selection.
news.summary:
JM Financial's Q4 playbook highlights sectors like IT, autos, telecom, and metals as key growth drivers. Preferred stocks include Infosys, Maruti Suzuki, ICICI Bank, Tata Steel, and Bharti Airtel.
Cautious on consumer, pharma, and utilities; stocks like HDFC Bank, Bajaj Finance, and LTIMindtree are marked 'avoid'. Report emphasizes sector-focused stock selection.

news.title:
JPMorgan upgrades Maruti Suzuki, M&M, Hero Moto, and TVS to overweight amid easing auto disruption risks.
Apollo Tyres downgraded to neutral with a lower target; Escorts upgraded to neutral with a new target price.
news.summary:
JPMorgan upgrades Maruti Suzuki, M&M, Hero Moto, and TVS to overweight amid easing auto disruption risks.
Apollo Tyres downgraded to neutral with a lower target; Escorts upgraded to neutral with a new target price.

news.title:
Sensex surged 2,989 pts, Nifty gained 890 pts as RBI held repo rate at 5.25%.
Bank, auto, realty stocks led gains; Axis Bank, Maruti Suzuki, and Prestige Estates rose sharply.
news.summary:
Sensex surged 2,989 pts, Nifty gained 890 pts as RBI held repo rate at 5.25%.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal lists Maruti Suzuki, TVS Motor, M&M as top picks amid Q4 challenges.
Auto sector faces input cost, crude price risks; ancillaries like Motherson, Endurance also favored.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal lists Maruti Suzuki, TVS Motor, M&M as top picks amid Q4 challenges.

news.title:
Goldman Sachs maintains Buy on Maruti Suzuki with ₹15,800 target, citing 4Q revenue & EBITDA ~5% above consensus.
Drivers include strong SUV/CNG mix, lower discounting; offset by commodity pressures, weaker treasury income, and higher costs.
news.summary:
Goldman Sachs maintains Buy on Maruti Suzuki with ₹15,800 target, citing 4Q revenue & EBITDA ~5% above consensus.
Drivers include strong SUV/CNG mix, lower discounting; offset by commodity pressures, weaker treasury income, and higher costs.

news.title:
Maruti Suzuki may hike small car prices in 2026 due to rising input costs.
High demand and pending orders strain profits on its affordable vehicle lineup.
news.summary:

Commodity price surge offsets gains from last year's tax cuts.

The company is optimistic about FY27 exports and will decide on price increases soon.

news.title:
Maruti Suzuki's March 2026 sales hit 225,251 units; FY26 total sales at 2,422,713 units.
Record domestic sales of 1,861,704 units and exports at 447,774 units achieved in FY26.
news.summary:

news.title:

Key picks include Maruti Suzuki, Eicher Motors, NTPC, HDFC Bank, and Apollo Hospitals, citing valuation comfort and growth visibility.

news.title:
Tata Motors PV sales expected to rise 37% YoY to 70,837 units in March 2026.
M&M SUV sales may grow 24.8% YoY; Maruti Suzuki sales estimated at 2.3 lakh units, up 19.8%.
news.summary:
